spec.description: AzureASOManagedClusterSpec defines the desired state of AzureASOManagedCluster.

controlPlaneEndpoint.description:
ControlPlaneEndpoint is the location of the API server within the control plane. CAPZ manages this field
and it should not be set by the user. It fulfills Cluster API's cluster infrastructure provider contract.
Because this field is programmatically set by CAPZ after resource creation, we define it as +optional
in the API schema to permit resource admission.

host.description: host is the hostname on which the API server is serving.

port.description: port is the port on which the API server is serving.

resources.description: Resources are embedded ASO resources to be managed by this resource.

status.description: AzureASOManagedClusterStatus defines the observed state of AzureASOManagedCluster.

ready.description:
Ready represents whether or not the cluster has been provisioned and is ready. It fulfills Cluster
API's cluster infrastructure provider contract.

resource.description: StatusResource is a handle to a resource.

exampleYAML:
apiVersion: infrastructure.cluster.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1
kind: AzureASOManagedCluster
metadata:
  name: example-azureasomanagedcluster
  namespace: default
spec:
  controlPlaneEndpoint: {}
  resources: []
